title: Senior Plant Manager at Microtek International

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Microtek International
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Microtek International in Jaipur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Microtek International:
Microtek International is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Microtek International!
